horizontal.description: Horizontal accuracy in meters. E.g., 5.0 (high precision), 100.0 (low precision)

vertical.description: Vertical accuracy in meters. E.g., 5.0 (high precision), 50.0 (low precision)

speed_at_event.description: Speed during the event in km/h

cargo_weight.description: Cargo weight at the time of the event in kg

AssetTrackingData.description: Represents tracking data for an asset

asset_id.description: Unique identifier of the asset. E.g.: "A123456789"

owner.description: Owner of the asset. E.g.: "Company ABC"

year.description: Year of manufacture of the asset. E.g.: 2020

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the data in ISO 8601 format. E.g.: "2024-10-22T14:23:45Z"

gps.description: Provides the geographical location of the asset and other related parameters such as altitude, speed, and direction. This data allows real-time tracking of the asset's position.

telecom.description: Describes the connectivity details of the asset, including SIM card information, GPS provider, and signal strength, allowing real-time verification of connectivity quality.

sensors.description: Sensor information allows monitoring of the asset's physical conditions, such as acceleration, gyroscopes, load weight, and distance traveled. This is essential for assessing asset usage and conditions.

driver_info.description: Provides basic information about the driver if the asset is a driven vehicle. This section is optional depending on the asset type.

co_driver_info.description: Provides basic information about the co-driver if the asset is a driven vehicle. This section is optional depending on the asset type.

peripherals.description: This section describes the peripherals connected to the asset, such as cameras and RFID readers, which can be used for visual monitoring or inventory management.

metrics.description: Metrics envelope following miot.metrics@1.0 specification. Provides a standardized container for telemetry metrics from OBD2, J1939, CAN, and other vehicle/IoT data sources.

BatteryLevel.description: Remaining battery level of the GPS device as a percentage

DriverInfo.description: Provides basic information about the driver if the asset is a driven vehicle. This section is optional depending on the asset type.

Event.description: This section documents events related to the asset, such as speeding, G-force impacts, or sudden movements, allowing evaluation of the asset's safety and operating conditions.

timestamp.description: Timestamp of the event in ISO format

threshold_exceeded.description: Whether the event exceeds a threshold

Gps.description: Provides the geographical location of the asset and other related parameters such as altitude, speed, and direction. This data allows real-time tracking of the asset's position.

altitude.description: Altitude in meters. E.g., -50.0 (below sea level), 1000.0 (mountain)

speed.description: Speed of the asset in km/h

MetricItem.description: Individual metric item within the metrics envelope. Represents a single telemetry measurement with its metadata.

k.description: Canonical metric key (e.g., engine.rpm, vehicle.speed, battery.voltage)

v.description: Metric value - can be number, boolean, string, object, or array

u.description: Canonical unit of measurement (e.g., rpm, km/h, V, %, C)

ts.description: Timestamp override for this specific metric in RFC3339 format

q.description: Quality indicator for the metric value

meta.description: Opaque metadata for traceability and debugging (e.g., PID, SPN, CAN ID)

MetricsEnvelope.description: Metrics envelope following miot.metrics@1.0 specification. Provides a standardized container for telemetry metrics from OBD2, J1939, CAN, and other vehicle/IoT data sources.

schema.description: Schema identifier for the metrics envelope format

items.description: Array of metric items (at least one required)

seq.description: Device sequence number for ordering and deduplication

device_ts.description: Device clock timestamp in RFC3339 format

trip_distance.description: Distance traveled in the current trip in km

Peripherals.description: This section describes the peripherals connected to the asset, such as cameras and RFID readers, which can be used for visual monitoring or inventory management.

status.description: Status of the RFID reader (true = functioning)

Sensors.description: Sensor information allows monitoring of the asset's physical conditions, such as acceleration, gyroscopes, load weight, and distance traveled. This is essential for assessing asset usage and conditions.

Telecom.description: Describes the connectivity details of the asset, including SIM card information, GPS provider, and signal strength, allowing real-time verification of connectivity quality.

iccid.description: ICCID (Integrated Circuit Card Identifier) of the SIM card

imsi.description: IMSI (International Mobile Subscriber Identity) of the SIM card

operator.description: Name of the mobile network operator

cell_id.description: Cell ID of the connected cell tower

oidc.description: JWT Bearer token from Auth0 M2M client credentials flow.

tags.name: Integration Connections
tags.description: External API connections, credential profiles, and endpoint operations

tags.name: Me
tags.description: Current user scopes and organization memberships

tags.name: Organization Admin
tags.description: Create sub-accounts, edit and soft-delete organizations

tags.name: Organization Members
tags.description: List and mutate members of an organization's Alfresco group or site

get.summary: List the caller's resolved organization scopes
get.description: Returns one entry per organization the caller is a member of, including the effective tax ids and enabled product modules. Used by the Next.js app to inject cust_account filters into pgrest queries.

post.summary: Add a person to an organization's Alfresco group

delete.summary: Remove a person from an organization's Alfresco group

put.summary: Replace the enabled module set for an organization

get.summary: List enabled module codes for an organization

post.summary: Create a sub-account under the given parent organization

patch.summary: Update display name and/or tax id of an organization

info.title: ModularIoT API
info.description: Multi-tenant fleet and driver resource management with KPI scoring
